title: framing_decision
description: Editorial framing selection for a run (SPEC §7.4, §13). v1: minimal contract aligned with bundled archetype ids; stub-friendly.

editorial_archetype_id.description: Stable id from bundled editorial archetype taxonomy v1 (SPEC §8). Must stay aligned with piece_brief.schema.json $defs.editorial_archetype_id.

run_id.description: Editorial run id (same as run manifest run_id, SPEC §12.1).

rejected_alternate_archetype_ids.description: Alternative frames considered and set aside (SPEC §7.4).

rationale.description: Why this frame fits the topic and sources.

candidate_analogs.description: Historical episodes or prior pieces to echo (paths, ids, or short labels).

key_implications_to_explore.description: Downstream angles worth developing in the piece.

proposed_structure_outline.description: Ordered section titles or beats for the draft (SPEC §7.4).
